title: Admin's Gauntlets
description: Adds the three gauntlets from minecraft story mode
body:
WARNING: this mod contains ocasional flashes.

The gauntlets that this mod adds are extremely overpowered and meant to be gifted from server admins to there favorite players, making them unobtainable in survival mode. There is a green one with 20 damage and 10 blocks knockback, a red one with 40 damage and 20 blocks knockback, and a golden one with 60 damage and 30 blocks knockback. If you are a player who received a gauntlet from an admin and want a special place to put it, you can make a gauntlet holder by putting a quartz pillar in a stonecutter. I also added glowing obsidian as a little bonus feature.

This mod reqiures more mcmeta emissive textures for some things to glow.

Credit to mcreator and blockbench.
